title: Hierarchical Analysis of RNA Secondary Structures with Pseudoknots Based on Sections - Source Code and Datasets
author: Masuki, Ryota
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Source code and datasets for the hierarchical RNA pseudoknot prediction method described in "Hierarchical Analysis of RNA Secondary Structures with Pseudoknots Based on Sections". Includes C implementation and complete datasets of 726 tmRNA and 454 RNase P RNA sequences.
steps_raw: Source code and datasets for the hierarchical RNA pseudoknot prediction method described in "Hierarchical Analysis of RNA Secondary Structures with Pseudoknots Based on Sections". Includes C implementation and complete datasets of 726 tmRNA and 454 RNase P RNA sequences.
